codeReview.summary: Commit 850a405 is a test-only change that adds direct imported-project regression evidence for the matrix and review surfaces. The new test in tests/test_json_import.py asserts matrix rows and location-time rows before and after import, deduction acceptance/rejection, edits, and reload, and it verifies resolved review-history presentation including rejection reasons after reload. I found no high-confidence correctness issue in the implemented feature scope.

summary: Pass. The feature delivers direct matrix/review parity regression evidence for imported projects across the claimed import/edit/deduction/reload flow, and no actionable correctness defects were identified.
